<<similar conditions>>  
fibromyalgia is similar to chronic pain conditions like rheumatoid arthritis and lupus. it often involves muscle pain and fatigue, and can be aggravated by stress or cold.  
***  
inside the body, fibromyalgia can affect the nervous system and cause unusual sensations. it is also linked to issues with the immune system and how the body processes pain.
